nl_prompt: What is the delivery success rate for Enterprise segment customers?
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.status_code = 4 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as success_rate FROM sf_accounts sa JOIN customers c ON c.email = sa.email_address JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref WHERE sa.sf_segment = 'Enterprise'
